source.title: Archives of Nethys: Arcanist spell list

spells.name: Acid Splash
spells.summary: Orb deals 1d3 acid damage.

spells.name: Arcane Mark
spells.summary: Inscribes a personal rune on an object or creature (visible or invisible).

spells.name: Bleed
spells.summary: Cause a stabilized creature to resume dying.

spells.name: Breeze
spells.summary: Create a light wind.

spells.name: Chameleon Scales
spells.summary: Change the color of your skin to something else.

spells.name: Dancing Lights
spells.summary: Creates torches or other lights.

spells.name: Daze
spells.summary: Humanoid creature of 4 HD or less loses next action.

spells.name: Detect Fiendish Presence
spells.summary: As detect evil, except this specifically detects outsiders with the evil subtype and their servants.

spells.name: Detect Poison
spells.summary: Detects poison in one creature or object.

spells.name: Disrupt Undead
spells.summary: Deals 1d6 damage to one undead.

spells.name: Drench
spells.summary: Soak the target creature or object.

spells.name: Flare
spells.summary: Dazzles one creature (–1 on attack rolls).

spells.name: Ghost Sound
spells.summary: Figment sounds.

spells.name: Grasp
spells.summary: Retry a Climb check as an immediate action

spells.name: Haunted Fey Aspect
spells.summary: You surround yourself with disturbing illusions.

spells.name: Jolt
spells.summary: Deal 1d3 electricity with a ranged touch attack.

spells.name: Mending
spells.summary: Makes minor repairs on an object.

spells.name: Message
spells.summary: Whisper conversation at distance.

spells.name: Oath of Anonymity
spells.summary: Cloak yourself in an illusion that hides your true identity

spells.name: Open/Close
spells.summary: Opens or closes small or light things.

spells.name: Penumbra
spells.summary: Keep something in the shadows.

spells.name: Prestidigitation
spells.summary: Performs minor tricks.

spells.name: Resistance
spells.summary: Subject gains +1 on saving throws.

spells.name: Root
spells.summary: Bolster the subject’s CMD vs. trips and Acrobatics checks to remain standing.

spells.name: Scoop
spells.summary: Use a small vessel of force to scoop up liquid or small objects.

spells.name: Scrivener's Chant
spells.summary: Imbue a quill to rapidly transcribe words from one page to another.

spells.name: Sotto Voce
spells.summary: Use your dry, rasping whisper to fill a creature with dread.

spells.name: Spark
spells.summary: Ignites flammable objects.

spells.name: Touch of Fatigue
spells.summary: Touch attack fatigues target.

spells.name: Vacuous Vessel
spells.summary: Make a single container appear empty.

spells.name: Abjuring Step
spells.summary: You can move slowly and safely and still cast spells, until you move quickly, make an attack, or cast a harmful spell.

spells.name: Abundant Ammunition
spells.summary: Replaces nonmagical ammunition every round.

spells.name: Adhesive Spittle
spells.summary: Spit a tanglefoot bag at a creature.

spells.name: Air Bubble
spells.summary: Creates a small pocket of air around your head or an object.

spells.name: Alchemical Tinkering
spells.summary: Transform an alchemical item or firearm into another similar item.

spells.name: Alter Musical Instrument
spells.summary: Make one instrument sound like a different kind of instrument.

spells.name: Alter Winds
spells.summary: Increase/decrease strength of natural winds.

spells.name: Animate Rope
spells.summary: Makes a rope move at your command.

spells.name: Ant Haul
spells.summary: Triples carrying capacity of a creature.

spells.name: Anticipate Peril
spells.summary: Target gains a bonus on one initiative check.

spells.name: Aphasia
spells.summary: Prevent a target from understanding language.

spells.name: Arcane Pocket
spells.summary: Conjure an extradimensional space inside a pouch or pocket.

spells.name: Auditory Hallucination
spells.summary: Create a phantasm with auditory effects.

spells.name: Authenticating Gaze
spells.summary: Gain a bonus on Appraise/Linguistics checks related to books and scrolls, along with some magical detection abilities.

spells.name: Bed of Iron
spells.summary: Allow the enchanted to sleep comfortably in medium or heavy armor.

spells.name: Bestow Planar Infusion I
spells.summary: Grant the target the effects of a planar infusion

spells.name: Blend
spells.summary: Change the color of yourself to match your surroundings and gain a bonus to Stealth.

spells.name: Blend with Surroundings
spells.summary: Change the appearance of a creature to better blend in with its surroundings.

spells.name: Blood Money
spells.summary: Use your own blood in order to create valuable material components.

spells.name: Blurred Movement
spells.summary: As blur, but only while you are moving.

spells.name: Body Capacitance
spells.summary: Store electricity attacks used against you and release the energy as a touch attack.

spells.name: Bouncy Body
spells.summary: Transmute the subject’s flesh into rubber, helping to protect against falls and grapples.

spells.name: Break
spells.summary: Gives an object the broken condition.

spells.name: Brightest Night
spells.summary: Grant improved low-light vision to several creatures

spells.name: Bungle
spells.summary: Target takes a -20 penalty on its next attack roll or check.

spells.name: Burning Disarm
spells.summary: Make a metal item become red hot, forcing those holding it to drop it or risk searing their hand.

spells.name: Burning Hands
spells.summary: 1d4/level fire damage (max 5d4).

spells.name: Burning Sands
spells.summary: Create a field of hot sand that creates difficult terrain and minor fire damage

spells.name: Cause Fear
spells.summary: One creature of 5 HD or less flees for 1d4 rounds.

spells.name: Celestial Healing
spells.summary: Grant fast healing 1 for 1 round/2 levels.

spells.name: Charm Fey
spells.summary: As charm person, but targets fey

spells.name: Chastise
spells.summary: +5 bonus to convince a target to do what you want or get in trouble with their superiors.

spells.name: Chill Touch
spells.summary: One touch/level deals 1d6 damage and possibly 1 Str damage.

spells.name: Clarion Call
spells.summary: Make yourself heard over great distances.

spells.name: Cloak of Secrets
spells.summary: Filter speech from a given area to sound like a different conversation.

spells.name: Coin Shot
spells.summary: Turn coins into deadly projectiles.

spells.name: Comprehend Languages
spells.summary: You understand all languages.

spells.name: Corrosive Touch
spells.summary: Touch attack deals 1d4 acid/level.

spells.name: Coward's Cowl
spells.summary: Enhance a target’s defensive instincts.

spells.name: Crafter's Curse
spells.summary: Subject takes –5 on Craft skill checks.

spells.name: Crafter's Fortune
spells.summary: Subject gains +5 on next Craft check.

spells.name: Cultural Adaptation
spells.summary: Adapt to fit the local cultural

spells.name: Cultural Adaptation (Taldan)
spells.summary: Better impersonate the member of a specific culture.

spells.name: Damp Powder
spells.summary: Ruins ammunition loaded in the targeted firearm.

spells.name: Dancing Darkness
spells.summary: Create four spheres of floating darkness.

spells.name: Dancing Lantern
spells.summary: Animates a lantern that follows you.

spells.name: Darting Duplicate
spells.summary: Summon a duplicate of yourself to provoke enemy attacks of opportunity.

spells.name: Dazzling Blade
spells.summary: Make a weapon appear dazzingly shiny, making it easier to disarm and feint in combat.

spells.name: Decompose Corpse
spells.summary: Turn a corpse into a clean skeleton.

spells.name: Decrepit Disguise
spells.summary: Make an object seem worthless.

spells.name: Deja Vu
spells.summary: Make a creature repeat its actions.

spells.name: Delusional Pride
spells.summary: Target is penalized on attacks and checks but gains bonus against charms and compulsions.

spells.name: Depilate
spells.summary: Creature takes -2 penalty to Diplomacy, Intimidate, and Perform for 1 week

spells.name: Desperate Weapon
spells.summary: Create an improvised weapon.

spells.name: Detect Charm
spells.summary: Detect charm, compulsion, and possession effects in the area

spells.name: Detect Metal
spells.summary: Detect metal objects or creatures.

spells.name: Detect Radiation
spells.summary: Detect radiation in the surrounding area.

spells.name: Detect Secret Doors
spells.summary: Reveals hidden doors within 60 ft.

spells.name: Detect Undead
spells.summary: Reveals undead within 60 ft.

spells.name: Discern Next of Kin
spells.summary: Read the target’s mind to learn about its family.

spells.name: Disguise Self
spells.summary: Changes your appearance.

spells.name: Disguise Weapon
spells.summary: Changes one weapon’s appearance.

spells.name: Ear-Piercing Scream
spells.summary: Deal sonic damage and daze target.

spells.name: Ears of the City
spells.summary: The target of this spell sees and hears a stream of past scenes and pieces of conversations related to local people and events.

spells.name: Emblazon Crest
spells.summary: Display your crest on anything you carry.

spells.name: Endothermic Touch
spells.summary: Stagger a creature and reduce their speed by half, but increase the time they can hold their breath.

spells.name: Endure Elements
spells.summary: Exist comfortably in hot or cold regions.

spells.name: Enlarge Person
spells.summary: Humanoid creature doubles in size.

spells.name: Enlarge Tail
spells.summary: Increase the reach and power of your tail.

spells.name: Erase
spells.summary: Mundane or magical writing vanishes.

spells.name: Expeditious Construction
spells.summary: Create a low wall or other simple structure of packed earth or stone.

spells.name: Expeditious Excavation
spells.summary: Moves 5-ft. cubes of earth.

spells.name: Expeditious Retreat
spells.summary: Your base land speed increases by 30 ft.

spells.name: Fabricate Bullets
spells.summary: Converts 1 pound of metal into ammunition.

spells.name: Fabricate Disguise
spells.summary: Create a disguise in an instant.

spells.name: Face of the Devourer
spells.summary: Horribly mutate the target’s face, disfiguring it while granting it a natural attack.

spells.name: False Face
spells.summary: Polymorph into a disguised identity

spells.name: Fastidiousness
spells.summary: Keep yourself and your equipment clean and dry

spells.name: Feather Fall
spells.summary: Objects or creatures fall slowly.

spells.name: Ferment
spells.summary: Affected liquid becomes alcoholic

spells.name: Flare Burst
spells.summary: As flare, but affects all creatures in 10 ft.

spells.name: Floating Disk
spells.summary: Creates 3-ft.-diameter horizontal disk that holds 100 lbs./level.

spells.name: Fool's Gold (VC)
spells.summary: Disguise copper pieces or silver pieces as gold pieces

spells.name: Forced Quiet
spells.summary: Target cannot make loud noises.

spells.name: Fumblestep
spells.summary: Target takes -1 penalty to Reflex and Acrobatics, discharge to perform a trip combat maneuver.

spells.name: Gentle Breeze
spells.summary: Light wind protects one target from clouds, gases, heat, and vapors.

spells.name: Glue Seal
spells.summary: Makes one 5-ft. square or one object sticky.

spells.name: Grappling Scarf
spells.summary: Enchanted scarf functions as grappling hook with 100 ft of rope

spells.name: Grasping Corpse
spells.summary: Cause a corpse to grab or trip a foe

spells.name: Gravity Bow
spells.summary: Arrows do damage as though one size category bigger.

spells.name: Grease
spells.summary: Makes 10-ft. square or one object slippery.

spells.name: Guardian Armor
spells.summary: Teleport your armor onto an ally in range

spells.name: Handy Grapnel
spells.summary: Transform a ropelike object into a retracting grapple.

spells.name: Heightened Awareness
spells.summary: Your recall and ability to process information improve.

spells.name: Hide Bruises
spells.summary: Disguise a creature's injuries, making them more difficult to heal

spells.name: Hide Weapon
spells.summary: Hide a weapon within your own arm.

spells.name: Hobble
spells.summary: Reduce creature's speed

spells.name: Hydraulic Push
spells.summary: Wave of water bull rushes an enemy.

spells.name: Hypnotism
spells.summary: Fascinates 2d4 HD of creatures.

spells.name: Icicle Dagger
spells.summary: Masterwork ice dagger deals +1 cold damage.

spells.name: Identify
spells.summary: Gives +10 bonus to identify magic items.

spells.name: Illusion of Calm
spells.summary: You appear to be standing still, even when you take some actions.

spells.name: Implant Urge
spells.summary: Implant a subconscious goal into a creature

spells.name: Incendiary Runes
spells.summary: As explosive runes, except it creates a small surge of flames instead of an explosion of force.

spells.name: Incessant Buzzing
spells.summary: Summon illusory wasps to distract creatures

spells.name: Infernal Healing
spells.summary: Give someone fast healing 1 for a minute, at the cost of a temporary evil alignment.

spells.name: Instant Portrait
spells.summary: Create a portrait of a creature on the touched surface

spells.name: Interrogation
spells.summary: Target answers questions or suffers pain.

spells.name: Invisibility Alarm
spells.summary: As alarm, but reacting only to invisible creatures.

spells.name: Itching Curse
spells.summary: Creature takes -1 penalty to attack, saves, skill checks, and ability checks

spells.name: Jump
spells.summary: Subject gets bonus on Acrobatics checks.

spells.name: Jury-Rig
spells.summary: Removes the broken condition from the targeted object.

spells.name: Keep Watch
spells.summary: Allow creatures to stand watch without fatigue throughout the night.

spells.name: Keyhole
spells.summary: Create a keyhole in any door or enlarge an existing keyhole

spells.name: Ki Arrow
spells.summary: Arrow deals damage as your unarmed strike.

spells.name: Kreighton's Perusal
spells.summary: Gain a brief understanding from a book as if you had read it for 1 hour.

spells.name: Liberating Command
spells.summary: Target makes an Escape Artist check as an immediate action and gains a bonus on it.

spells.name: Lighten Object
spells.summary: Decrease the target’s weight by half or reduce the armor check penalty of armor.

spells.name: Line in the Sand
spells.summary: Increase your attacks of opportunity per round.

spells.name: Linked Legacy
spells.summary: Share information with all targets of the spell in the blink of an eye.

spells.name: Lock Gaze
spells.summary: Compels the target to look only at you for the duration of the spell.

spells.name: Locksight
spells.summary: Determine from a distance the quality of a lock and whether it is open, closed, or jammed.

spells.name: Long Arm
spells.summary: Your arms lengthen, giving you extra reach.

spells.name: Longshot
spells.summary: Grants a +10-foot bonus to the range increment for any ranged weapon fired.

spells.name: Lose the Trail
spells.summary: Obscure a target’s tracks when fleeing from a pursuer.

spells.name: Lucky Number
spells.summary: Tweak tiny variables in a creature’s immediate future.

spells.name: Magic Aura
spells.summary: Alters object's magic aura.

spells.name: Magic Weapon
spells.summary: Weapon gains +1 bonus.

spells.name: Marid's Mastery
spells.summary: Target gains bonus to attack/damage when combat is in water, penalty if on land.

spells.name: Memorize Page
spells.summary: Target perfectly memorizes one page of information.

spells.name: Memory Lapse
spells.summary: Subject forgets events back to last turn.

spells.name: Mindlink
spells.summary: Communicate a great deal of information in an instant.

spells.name: Mirror Mantis
spells.summary: Creature sees an looming assassin whenever they see their reflection in a mirror

spells.name: Mirror Polish
spells.summary: Polish a metal item until it’s usable as a mirror.

spells.name: Mirror Strike
spells.summary: You may strike multiple opponents with a single attack.

spells.name: Moment of Greatness
spells.summary: Doubles a morale bonus.

spells.name: Monkey Fish
spells.summary: Gain a climb speed and a swim speed of 10 ft. for a time.

spells.name: Mount
spells.summary: Summons riding horse for 2 hours/level.

spells.name: Mudball
spells.summary: Throw a ball of mud to blind your enemy.

spells.name: Murderous Crow
spells.summary: Conjure a supernaturally vicious and clever crow to watch over you.

spells.name: Negative Reaction
spells.summary: Targeted creature may not positively influence anyone.

spells.name: Night Blindness
spells.summary: Impair target’s vision as if it were darker.

spells.name: Obscure Poison
spells.summary: Make it harder to detect a poison or venomous creature.

spells.name: Obscuring Mist
spells.summary: Fog surrounds you.

spells.name: Open and Shut
spells.summary: Obfuscate whether a door is open or closed.

spells.name: Pattern Recognition
spells.summary: Gain an insight bonus on Search checks and Survival checks to follow tracks.

spells.name: Peace Bond
spells.summary: Create a glowing rune of peace to protect targets from your own magic.

spells.name: Peacebond
spells.summary: Locks a weapon in place on the target's body.

spells.name: Peasant Armaments
spells.summary: Transform improvised weapons into actual weapons.

spells.name: Pesh Vigor
spells.summary: Increase target’s strength with consumption of pesh.

spells.name: Phantom Blood
spells.summary: Gain temporary hp if Con loss would knock you out or kill you.

spells.name: Pierce Facade
spells.summary: Gain a +5 insight bonus to Perception to see through disguises

spells.name: Planar Orientation
spells.summary: Locate places of power on your current plane

spells.name: Poisoned Egg
spells.summary: Transform a single egg into a dose of poison.

spells.name: Polypurpose Panacea
spells.summary: Gain a relaxing or entertaining effect.

spells.name: Positive Pulse
spells.summary: Energy harms undead or bolsters the living

spells.name: Preserve
spells.summary: Prevent objects from rotting and spoiling

spells.name: Protection from Chaos
spells.summary: +2 to AC and saves, plus additional protection against selected alignment.

spells.name: Protection from Evil
spells.summary: +2 to AC and saves, plus additional protection against selected alignment.

spells.name: Protection from Good
spells.summary: +2 to AC and saves, plus additional protection against selected alignment.

spells.name: Protection from Law
spells.summary: +2 to AC and saves, plus additional protection against selected alignment.

spells.name: Punishing Armor
spells.summary: Coat yourself with a thin layer of energy that turns back nonlethal damage on your attacker.

spells.name: Quintessence
spells.summary: Mask any flaws of or damage to a creature or object.

spells.name: Ray of Enfeeblement
spells.summary: Ray causes 1d6 Str penalty + 1 per 2 levels.

spells.name: Ray of Sickening
spells.summary: Ray makes subject sickened.

spells.name: Recharge Innate Magic
spells.summary: Regain a use of all 0-level and 1st-level spell-like abilities.

spells.name: Reduce Person
spells.summary: Humanoid creature halves in size.

spells.name: Refine Improvised Weapon
spells.summary: Transform improvised weapon into a masterwork simple or martial weapon.

spells.name: Reinforce Armaments
spells.summary: Temporarily mitigates the fragile quality in targeted weapon or armor.

spells.name: Repair Undead
spells.summary: Heals one undead of 1d8 hp + 1/level (max +5).

spells.name: Restore Corpse
spells.summary: Skeletal corpse grows flesh.

spells.name: Reveal Secrets
spells.summary: Target reveals if it has secret knowledge of a topic

spells.name: Rite of Centered Mind
spells.summary: +1 to saves vs mind-affecting effects for 24 hours, discharge to reroll a failed save vs a mind-affecting effect.

spells.name: Rune Trace
spells.summary: Learn information about a magical rune without triggering it

spells.name: Sculpt Corpse
spells.summary: Makes corpse look like another creature.

spells.name: Sculpted Cape
spells.summary: Enchanted cape stiffens and can bear weight

spells.name: Secluded Grimoire
spells.summary: Safeguard your spellbook on the Ethereal Plane

spells.name: See Alignment
spells.summary: Pick an alignment; in your sight, creatures and items with that alignment emit a ghostly radiance.

spells.name: Serren's Swift Girding
spells.summary: Immediately clad a number of targets in armor.

spells.name: Shadow Trap
spells.summary: Pin someone’s target, causing them to become stuck.

spells.name: Shadow Weapon
spells.summary: Create a quasi-real masterwork weapon.

spells.name: Shadowfade
spells.summary: Become invisibile to creatures using darkvision

spells.name: Shield Companion (AA)
spells.summary: As shield other, but affects the caster’s animal companion or familiar.

spells.name: Shield Speech
spells.summary: Speak freely to one creature within 10 feet without being overheard.

spells.name: Shock Shield
spells.summary: A shield of force protects you until you dismiss it in an explosion of electricity.

spells.name: Shocking Grasp
spells.summary: Touch delivers 1d6/level electricity damage (max 5d6).

spells.name: Silent Image
spells.summary: Creates minor illusion of your design.

spells.name: Skim
spells.summary: Read four times faster than normal

spells.name: Skin Tag
spells.summary: Curse food or drink to gain afamilar connection to the creature

spells.name: Snapdragon Fireworks
spells.summary: Create 1 dragon firework/level.

spells.name: Snowball
spells.summary: Throw a conjured ball of snow at a target

spells.name: Songbird
spells.summary: Conjure music from a good-aligned plane

spells.name: Sow Thought
spells.summary: Plant an idea in the mind of the subject.

spells.name: Speak Local Language
spells.summary: Target gains the ability to speak and understand a regional human language.

spells.name: Speechreader's Sight
spells.summary: Read lips from a distance

spells.name: Spirit Share
spells.summary: Grant beneficial liquids with a touch

spells.name: Starsight
spells.summary: Observe the night sky as if it were a clear and unobstructed night.

spells.name: Stone Fist
spells.summary: Your unarmed strikes are lethal.

spells.name: Stone Shield
spells.summary: Summon a thick stone slab from the ground to shield you from attacks.

spells.name: Strong Wings
spells.summary: Enhance the target’s wings, giving them greater fly speed and maneuverability.

spells.name: Stumble Gap
spells.summary: Small hole trips creatures.

spells.name: Stunning Barrier
spells.summary: Magical field grants a +1 bonus to AC and on saves, and stuns one creature attacking you.

spells.name: Summon Minor Monster
spells.summary: Summon 1d3 Tiny animals.

spells.name: Summon Monster 1
spells.summary: Summons extraplanar creature to fight for you.

spells.name: Sunder Breaker
spells.summary: The next weapon that sunders an item belonging to the target takes damage.

spells.name: Sundering Shards
spells.summary: Sundered item explodes, dealing 1d6 damage to adjacent creatures.

spells.name: Sure Casting
spells.summary: Treat your CL as 5 higher for the purposes of bypassing SR with the next spell you cast

spells.name: Technomancy
spells.summary: As detect magic, except detecting the presence of technological objects.

spells.name: Theft Ward
spells.summary: Gain a +10 Perception bonus to notice someone trying to take a specific object from you.

spells.name: Thunderstomp
spells.summary: Trip one creature within range.

spells.name: Touch of Blindness
spells.summary: Coat a creature’s eyes in darkness, blinding them.

spells.name: Touch of Combustion
spells.summary: Cause someone to combust with a touch.

spells.name: Touch of Gracelessness
spells.summary: Subject loses 1d6 + 1 Dex/two levels and is prone to falling down.

spells.name: Touch of the Sea
spells.summary: Swim speed becomes 30 ft.

spells.name: Transfer Tattoo
spells.summary: Transfer a magical tattoo from one creature to another.

spells.name: Tripvine
spells.summary: Animate a rope/vine/etc. to trip nearby creatures.

spells.name: True Skill
spells.summary: Gain an insight bonus equal to half your caster level on one skill check

spells.name: True Strike
spells.summary: +20 on your next attack roll.

spells.name: Undine's Curse
spells.summary: The target loses it’s body’s natural ability to breathe automatically.

spells.name: Unerring Weapon
spells.summary: Grants a +2 bonus, +1 per four caster levels, on attack rolls to confirm a critical hit.

spells.name: Unhallowed Blows
spells.summary: One natural weapon or unarmed strike of subject undead gets +1 on attack and damage rolls

spells.name: Unlock Flesh
spells.summary: Stagger a living creature or deal 1d6 damage/level to a corporeal undead

spells.name: Unprepared Combatant
spells.summary: Target takes -4 on initiative and Reflex saves.

spells.name: Unseen Servant
spells.summary: Invisible force obeys your commands.

spells.name: Unwelcome Halo
spells.summary: Force a halo around a target, preventing it from hiding in the dark.

spells.name: Urban Grace
spells.summary: Move through crowds and urban settings with ease.

spells.name: Vanish
spells.summary: As invisibility for 1 round/level (5 max).

spells.name: Ventriloquism
spells.summary: Throws voice for 1 min./level.

spells.name: Vocal Alteration
spells.summary: Disguise target's voice.

spells.name: Waterproof
spells.summary: Target becomes waterproof for the spells duration

spells.name: Wave Shield
spells.summary: Water blunts one incoming attack or fire effect.

spells.name: Weaken Powder
spells.summary: Targeted firearm's ammunition halves the firearm's range and imposes a –2 penalty on damage rolls.

spells.name: Web Bolt
spells.summary: Throw a fist-sized ball of webbing at a target to ensare them.

spells.name: Windy Escape
spells.summary: Briefly become insubstantial, allowing an attack to pass harmlessly through you.

spells.name: Winter Feathers
spells.summary: Protect a feathered creature from the cold for a day.

spells.name: Wizened Appearance
spells.summary: Make a target appear as an older version of itself.

spells.name: Youthful Appearance
spells.summary: Target appears younger.
